version_description: It sounds like the base of the song once you've removed Zach's fancy picking, but it's also a simple version that could be good for beginning guitar players to learn.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I recently saw a video of Zach playing this in Ireland and so I'm fixing it to how he played it.
Updated: 7/20/25

---------------------------------
* means single strum
Strumming pattern you play once per chord

Capo: 5th fret


[Intro]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
The kids are in town for a funeral[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
So, pack the car and dry your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I know they got plenty of young blood left in 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
And plenty nights under pink skies[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You taught 'em to enjoy[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
So, clean the house, clear the drawers[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Mop the floors, stand tall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Like no one's ever been here before or at all[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
And don't you mention all the inches[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
That are scraped on the door frame[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
We all know you tip toed up to 4'1 back in '08[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
If you could see 'em now, you'd be proud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
But you'd think they's yuppies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Your funeral was beautiful[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
I bet God heard you coming[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
The kids are in town for a funeral[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
And the grass all smells the same as the[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
day you broke your arm swingin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
On that kid out on the river[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
You bailed him out, never said a thing[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
about Jesus or the way he's living[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
If you could see 'em now, you'd be proud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
But you'd think they's yuppies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Your funeral was beautiful[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
I bet God heard you coming[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
If you could see 'em now, you'd be proud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
But you'd think they's yuppies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Your funeral was beautiful[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
I bet God heard you coming[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]*      [ch]G[/ch]*            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
The kids are in town for a funeral[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]*       [ch]G[/ch]*               [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
So, pack the car and dry your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]*           [ch]G[/ch]*      [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I know they got plenty of young blood left in 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]*     [ch]G[/ch]*      [ch]Em[/ch]*
And plenty nights under pink skies[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]*
You taught 'em to enjoy[/tab]
